findings.description: Weak hash algorithm specified: "md5"
findings.suggestion: Use SHA-256 or stronger algorithms instead of MD5 or SHA-1

findings.description: fetch() without timeout - vulnerable to slowloris DoS
findings.suggestion: Add timeout to fetch using AbortSignal with setTimeout, or use a library like axios with timeout config.

findings.description: Error object logged directly - may contain sensitive data or stack traces
findings.suggestion: Log only safe error properties (message, code). Sanitize error messages before displaying to users. Never expose stack traces in production.

findings.suggestion: Move secrets to environment variables or secure config management

findings.description: Sensitive app without runtime integrity or tamper detection
findings.suggestion: Implement runtime integrity checks: Play Integrity API (Android), App Attest (iOS), or signature verification to detect tampering.
